concept: Create a game where the player controls a park ranger with the ability to communicate with different species in a nature preserve threatened by mysterious phenomena. Build trust with animal communities by solving their unique problems and learning their distinct perspectives on the encroaching danger. Coordinate responses between species with conflicting interests to address larger ecological challenges no single group can handle alone. Discover that the preserve sits atop an ancient site where the boundary between worlds has begun to fracture, allowing anomalous entities to slip through.
